Free JavaScript Formatter (Beautifier) online tool for formatting and beautifying JavaScript code instantly.JavaScript is one of the most widely used programming languages for modern websites and web applications. However, working with messy or minified JavaScript can make debugging and editing difficult.
A JavaScript Formatter, also known as a JavaScript Beautifier, automatically organizes your code by adding proper indentation, spacing, and line breaks. This makes your code much easier to read while keeping its functionality exactly the same.
Whether you're a beginner learning JavaScript or a professional developer maintaining large projects, using a formatter saves time and improves productivity.
Our free online JavaScript Formatter offers several useful features:
• Instant code beautification
• Copy formatted code
• Upload JavaScript (.js) files
• Download formatted code
• Live statistics for lines, characters, and file size
• Mobile-friendly interface
• No registration required
Unlike a JavaScript Minifier, which compresses code for production, a JavaScript Formatter is designed to improve readability for development and debugging.
If you're looking for a fast and free way to format JavaScript online, you can try our tool here:
👉 https://seo-toolkit-hub.blogspot.com/2026/07/free-javascript-formatter-beautifier.html
We also provide many other free developer and SEO tools, including HTML Formatter, CSS Formatter, JavaScript Minifier, JSON Formatter, QR Code Generator, and more.
Happy coding!
